prompt: A sinister demon inquisitor scientist in a dark, bio-punk laboratory. The demon has curved horns with metal rings, eyes replaced by multiple glowing red camera lenses, and wears a blood-stained leather apron over a tattered lab coat. One arm is a massive mechanical prosthetic with integrated surgical saws and glowing tubes filled with golden celestial ichor. Background features high-tech demonic torture devices and a containment tube with faint angel wings visible inside. Dark fantasy, industrial, cinematic lighting, high detail.
